name: product-flow
description: AI-first product development workflow for Claude Code. From idea to production.

plugins.name: craft
plugins.description: Recommended. Lightweight engineering workflow: prod (define the product), arch (define architecture, stack, conventions), spec (turn intent into a buildable spec with verifiable acceptance criteria).

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Heavyweight, full-ceremony alternative — staged commands from idea to production (define product, architecture, MVP features, mockups, plan, implement, review). Most projects should prefer craft.
